name: Tabbouleh (Lemon-parsley Salad) (Nfxs18b)
recipeIngredient: 2 large bunches parsley, finely chopped (about 4 cups)
1 Head iceberg lettuce, separated into leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the bulgar wheat with hot water and let stand for 1 hour.
2. Pound the grated onion with the pestle of a mortar or the back of a heavy spoon until well combined with the bulgar wheat.
3. Mix in the finely chopped parsley, tomatoes, and mint into the bular wheat mixture.
4. In another bowl, combine the lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper and beat with a fork until well blended.
5. Pour the dressing over the parsley mixture and mix well to coat evenly.
6. To serve, place the Tabbouleh on a platter surrounded by lettuce leaves.
7. Eat the Tabbouleh in the Lebanese manner by scooping it up with lettuce leaves and eating with your fingers.
